'''Ket Krax''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Troob]]. He was the son of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Krax]] and [[Stigrit Krax]]. He was secretly in love with [[Larka Nimondro]], the daughter of the enemy [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Nimondro]]. [[Jake Harthan]] murdered Ket with a [[Vibro-shiv/Legends|vibro-shiv]], blaming it on Larka in hopes of provoking a major war and stealing control of the [[sky cannon]].

{{Char-stub}}
